hero.description: I create dive journeys with close attention to detail, in collaboration with trusted local partners. Whenever possible, I personally accompany the journeys, ensuring safety, ease and an experience aligned with the destination.

mission.label: Dive Journeys, Chosen with Care
mission.heading: More Than Just a Holiday
mission.description: Each journey is carefully selected, with a strong focus on quality, safety, respect for the ocean and the communities we visit. Blue Soul Journeys focuses exclusively on dive travel — from liveaboard expeditions to stays at carefully selected dive resorts.
mission.value1Description: Every destination is chosen with care, working exclusively with trusted local partners and well-tested experiences.
mission.value2Description: Travel that respects the ocean, the people and natural rhythms — creating meaningful experiences without rush or excess.
mission.value3Description: Each journey is designed with intention, shaped around who you are and what you seek from the ocean.

aboutUs.label: What I Do
aboutUs.heading: Dive Journeys Designed with Care & Purpose
aboutUs.description: I design dive journeys bringing together trusted local knowledge, thoughtful planning and respect for the ocean.
aboutUs.subheading: Born from real dives and genuine connections
aboutUs.paragraph1: Blue Soul Journeys grew from years spent in and around the ocean — diving remote reefs, exploring iconic wrecks and sharing time with people whose lives are shaped by the sea.
aboutUs.paragraph2: Every journey I create is rooted in places I know, journeys I've experienced first-hand and partners I trust deeply. I don't build trips from a catalogue.
aboutUs.paragraph3: Whether it's a liveaboard in the Red Sea, drifting through the channels of the Maldives or slow, immersive dives along the Mozambican coast, each journey is designed to feel personal, conscious and connected to the ocean.
aboutUs.value1Description: I believe travel should respect the ocean, the people and natural rhythms — creating meaningful experiences without rush or excess.
aboutUs.value2Description: For me, diving is more than exploration. It's a way to slow down, observe and reconnect — with the ocean, with others and with ourselves.
aboutUs.value3Description: Each itinerary is thoughtfully designed, built around trusted local partners — always prioritising safety, quality and authenticity.

destinations.heading: Featured Dive Journeys
destinations.description1: From remote coral reefs to legendary wrecks, these dive journeys invite you to explore the ocean in its many expressions - from calm, contemplative dives to more intense encounters.
destinations.description2: Each destination moves at its own rhythm, leaving space to observe, feel and dive at your own pace.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.heading: Ready to Start Your
contact.description: Let's create a travel experience that feels like you — guided by experience and deeply connected to the ocean.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your dream dive journey...

footer.brandDescription: Dive journeys designed for those who truly feel at home in the ocean. Each journey is chosen for its quality, ethical approach and genuine connection to the ocean.
footer.copyright: Blue Soul Journeys. All rights reserved.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: Every Journey Starts with a Conversation
howItWorks.description: From there, I design a travel experience shaped around who you are, how you dive and what you seek from the ocean.
howItWorks.step1Description: A relaxed conversation to understand your travel style, diving experience and what you're looking for — beyond dates and destinations.
howItWorks.step2Description: Based on our conversation, I design destinations, stays and dive experiences that match your rhythm — always prioritising safety, quality and authenticity.
howItWorks.step3Description: I take care of logistics and coordination, ensuring everything flows smoothly — from dive operators and liveaboards to accommodations.
howItWorks.step4Description: Before and during your journey, I'm available to support you whenever needed — creating space for you to fully experience the ocean.
howItWorks.trust1: I work closely with a small circle of trusted local operators — people I've dived with, learned from and built long-term relationships with.
howItWorks.trust2: These partnerships are built on clear values: safety, respect for the ocean and genuine care for the experiences of each traveller.
howItWorks.trust3: Some journeys are accompanied by me, whenever my presence adds real value to the group and the overall experience.
howItWorks.trust4: Others are led by the local teams I trust completely — always with the same level of care, preparation and attention to detail.
howItWorks.expect1: Transparency, honest guidance and a journey designed with purpose.
howItWorks.expect2: No rush. No unnecessary extras. Just thoughtfully structured dive experiences, delivered responsibly and in tune with what truly matters to you.
howItWorks.expect3: Beyond planning trips, I create experiences, select trusted partners and support you before and during the entire journey.

whyTravelWithMe.label: Why Travel With Me
whyTravelWithMe.heading: Travel with Purpose. Explore with Confidence.
whyTravelWithMe.description: Real ocean experience, quality partners and meaningful, personal travel designed around you.
whyTravelWithMe.reason1Description: Years spent in and around the ocean have shaped the way I travel — and the way I design each journey. I help you choose destinations and experiences that respect your rhythm, your interests and your comfort level — always grounded in real, first-hand experience, never from catalogues.
whyTravelWithMe.reason2Description: Every destination is chosen with care. I work exclusively with trusted local partners — responsible operators and well-tested experiences — so you can travel with peace of mind, knowing you are supported at every stage of your journey.
whyTravelWithMe.reason3Description: Each journey is designed with intention — balancing nature, culture, adventure and time. The result is an experience that feels deep, fluid and authentic. Never rushed. Never generic.
whyTravelWithMe.withMe3: Support before and during your journey
whyTravelWithMe.withMe5: A journey that truly feels like yours
whyTravelWithMe.onYourOwn4: Hard to assess what's safe or truly worth it

myStory.label: My Story
myStory.heading: The ocean changed my life in ways I never expected.
myStory.timeline2018P1: My journey began in 2018, when I completed my Open Water Course aboard my first liveaboard in Australia.
myStory.timeline2018P2: On that first dive, something shifted. I felt an immediate sense of belonging — a quiet mix of clarity, freedom and presence that only the ocean can offer.
myStory.timeline2018P3: Since then, the ocean has stayed with me, wherever I go.
myStory.timeline2020P1: In 2020, a liveaboard experience in Thailand deepened that connection even further.
myStory.timeline2020P2: Later, in Mozambique, I moved closer to marine conservation and completed my Advanced Open Water Course certification.
myStory.timeline2020P3: Each journey added a new layer — not only as a diver, but as a person.
myStory.timeline2024P1: In 2024, I explored Raja Ampat — one of the most biodiverse marine regions on the planet.
myStory.timeline2024P2: Being there confirmed something I already felt deeply: the ocean has the power to shift how we see the world, how we move through it and how we relate to nature.
myStory.timeline2025Title: The Origin of Blue Soul Journeys
myStory.timeline2025P1: In 2025, during a liveaboard in Egypt — surrounded by vibrant reefs, historic wrecks and remarkable people — I reached a turning point.
myStory.timeline2025P2: I felt a strong desire to share this connection to the ocean with others. Not as something occasional or superficial, but in a way that was consistent, thoughtful and intentional.
myStory.timeline2025P3: I wanted to create a space where travellers could feel safe, supported and confident. A space built on trust — in the partners, the itineraries, the pace of the journey — allowing people to simply be present.
myStory.timeline2025P4: A place where the ocean wasn't just a backdrop, but part of the experience, the rhythm and the way of travelling.
myStory.timeline2025P5: That was when Blue Soul Journeys truly began.
myStory.connectionHeading: More Than Places — It's the People
myStory.connectionP1: What makes these journeys truly special isn't only where we go, but who we share them with.
myStory.connectionP2: The ocean is where I slow down, breathe deeply and feel most present. It's where I gain perspective and return to balance.
myStory.connectionP3: Over time, I've realized that the ocean doesn't just change us individually. It creates connection.
myStory.connectionP4: On liveaboards and shared journeys, conversations unfold naturally. People meet around a shared respect for the ocean, for simplicity and for a more conscious way of traveling.
myStory.value1Description: Every journey is designed with care, attention and trusted partners — so you can simply be present.
myStory.value2Description: The best moments happen when like-minded people come together with a shared respect for the ocean.
myStory.wantHeading: I want you to feel what I've felt
myStory.wantLine1: The magic of the underwater world,
myStory.wantLine2: the silence of sunrise at sea,
myStory.wantLine3: the excitement of learning something new,
myStory.wantLine4: the calm that only the ocean can give.
myStory.wantP1: And I want you to feel safe — knowing your journey has been designed with care, attention and trusted partners.
myStory.wantClosing2: It's a way to reconnect with who you are.

red-sea.name: The Red Sea
red-sea.description: A journey into the origins of modern diving, shaped by history, vibrant reefs and the iconic wrecks of the Red Sea.
longDescription: The Red Sea is where modern recreational diving was born. Its crystal-clear waters, reaching visibility of up to 40 metres, reveal a world of vibrant coral gardens, dramatic wall dives, and some of the most iconic wrecks in the world — including the SS Thistlegorm, a World War II cargo ship resting on the seabed since 1941.

Our Red Sea expeditions take you beyond the crowded resort reefs. We explore the remote southern reaches by liveaboard, visiting untouched sites like Elphinstone Reef, where oceanic whitetip sharks patrol the blue, and the Brothers Islands, home to thriving soft coral forests and schooling hammerheads.

Whether you are drawn to the history beneath the waves or the kaleidoscope of marine life that thrives on every reef, the Red Sea offers a diving experience that is both deeply rooted in tradition and endlessly surprising.
red-sea.highlight1Description: Dive the SS Thistlegorm, the Rosalie Moller, and other legendary wrecks preserved by warm, clear waters.
red-sea.highlight2Description: Explore vibrant hard and soft coral gardens teeming with life, from tiny nudibranchs to giant moray eels.
red-sea.highlight3Description: Spot oceanic whitetip sharks, hammerheads, dolphins, and manta rays in the deep blue channels.
red-sea.vesselDescription: A carefully selected liveaboard vessel offering comfortable cabins, spacious dive decks, and access to remote dive sites across the southern Red Sea. The boat is equipped with modern safety equipment, Nitrox, and experienced crew who know these waters intimately.
amenities: Spacious dive deck with personal storage
Full-board meals with fresh, local cuisine

itinerary.title: Arrival & Check-in
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hurghada or Marsa Alam. Transfer to the liveaboard, settle into your cabin, safety briefing and a check dive in sheltered waters.

itinerary.title: Northern Wrecks & Reefs
itinerary.description: Dive the SS Thistlegorm and surrounding reef systems. Explore the cargo holds, encounter resident marine life, and night dive on the wreck.

itinerary.title: Brothers Islands
itinerary.description: Open water crossing to the Brothers. Wall dives with soft corals, hammerhead sharks, and the Numidia wreck. Some of the most dramatic diving in the Red Sea.

itinerary.title: Elphinstone & Daedalus
itinerary.description: Drift dives along Elphinstone's famous walls, with chances to see oceanic whitetip sharks. Daedalus offers pristine reefs and pelagic encounters.

itinerary.title: Return & Departure
itinerary.description: Final morning dive, return to port. Transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

red-sea.transfers: Airport transfers between Hurghada International Airport (HRG) or Marsa Alam Airport (RMF) and the liveaboard marina are included in the journey. I'll coordinate your arrival and departure times to ensure a smooth connection. If you'd like to arrive earlier or extend your stay, I can help arrange additional accommodation.

maldives.name: The Maldives
maldives.description: A journey guided by the rhythm of the ocean — drifting through channels, currents and frequent encounters with large pelagic species.
longDescription: The Maldives is a diver's paradise — a chain of 26 atolls scattered across the Indian Ocean, where warm currents bring an extraordinary concentration of marine life to channels, thilas, and cleaning stations. Here, the diving is defined by drift: you surrender to the current and let the ocean carry you through a world of colour and movement.

Our Maldives itineraries focus on the Central and Deep South Atolls, far from the tourist hubs. We visit manta cleaning stations where dozens of rays glide in graceful circles, explore channel dives teeming with grey reef sharks and schools of jackfish, and drift along coral-encrusted overhangs alive with soft corals and glass fish.

Above the waterline, life aboard our carefully selected liveaboards is unhurried and intimate. Between dives, you can kayak across turquoise lagoons, snorkel with whale sharks, or simply watch the sun set over an ocean that stretches to every horizon.
maldives.highlight1Description: Visit world-renowned cleaning stations where mantas gather in remarkable numbers throughout the season.
maldives.highlight2Description: Ride ocean currents through atoll channels surrounded by sharks, rays, and dense schools of fish.
maldives.highlight3Description: Explore the rarely visited Deep South, where pristine reefs remain untouched and marine life is abundant.
maldives.vesselDescription: A traditional dhoni-style liveaboard, thoughtfully refitted for diving comfort. The vessel carries a small group of divers, allowing for personalised dive briefings and flexible itineraries based on conditions and marine life sightings.
amenities: Full-board meals with Maldivian and international cuisine
included: Tea, coffee, water and soft drinks

itinerary.title: Arrival in Malé
itinerary.description: Arrive at Velana International Airport. Transfer to the liveaboard, welcome briefing and a sunset check dive on a nearby reef.

itinerary.title: South Malé & Vaavu Atoll
itinerary.description: Channel dives with grey reef sharks and eagle rays. Visit manta cleaning stations and drift through thilas alive with colour.

itinerary.title: Meemu & Thaa Atolls
itinerary.description: Venture into less-visited atolls. Night dives with nurse sharks, pristine coral gardens, and chances for whale shark encounters.

itinerary.title: Deep South — Huvadhoo Atoll
itinerary.description: The jewel of the trip. Strong currents bring dense schools of fish, hammerheads, and mantas. Some of the most thrilling drift dives in the Maldives.

itinerary.title: Return & Departure
itinerary.description: Final morning dive, cruise back towards Malé. Transfer to the airport for your departure.

maldives.transfers: The liveaboard departs from Malé, easily accessible from Velana International Airport (MLE). I'll coordinate transfers between the airport and the marina. For early arrivals or late departures, I can arrange hotel accommodation in Malé or Hulhumalé.

mozambique.name: Mozambique
mozambique.description: A journey developed in partnership with local dive centres and accommodation, where connection to the ocean and the local community is part of the experience.
longDescription: Mozambique is one of the last true frontiers of diving. Along its wild coastline, the warm Agulhas Current sweeps nutrient-rich waters close to shore, creating a marine ecosystem of staggering diversity and scale. This is where you come face to face with the ocean's giants — whale sharks, manta rays, humpback whales, and the elusive oceanic manta.

Our Mozambique expeditions are based around Tofo and the Inhambane coast, where the diving is raw, real, and utterly unforgettable. Morning dives often begin with a boat ride through the surf, landing you on reef systems that few divers have ever explored. The visibility can surprise you, the currents can challenge you, and the encounters will stay with you forever.

Beyond the diving, Mozambique offers a cultural richness that adds depth to every journey. From the warm hospitality of local fishing communities to the flavours of peri-peri seafood cooked on the beach, this is a destination that engages all your senses.
mozambique.highlight1Description: One of the best places on Earth for whale shark and oceanic manta ray encounters in open water.
mozambique.highlight2Description: Dive pristine coral systems along the wild coast, far from the crowds and full of surprises.
mozambique.highlight3Description: Connect with local coastal communities and experience the authentic spirit of East Africa.
mozambique.vesselDescription: A carefully selected beachfront dive resort in Tofo, run in partnership with a local dive centre. The accommodation is simple, comfortable, and deeply connected to the local community — with ocean views, warm hospitality, and direct access to the beach.
amenities: On-site dive centre with experienced guides

itinerary.title: Arrival in Tofo
itinerary.description: Arrive in Inhambane. Transfer to the dive resort in Tofo, settle in and enjoy your first evening on the beach.

itinerary.title: Reef Exploration
itinerary.description: Morning boat dives on Tofo's reef systems — Manta Reef, Giants Castle, and the Back Wall. Afternoon snorkelling or beach time.

itinerary.title: Ocean Safari
itinerary.description: A full-day ocean safari searching for whale sharks, mantas, dolphins, and humpback whales (seasonal). An unforgettable open-water experience.

itinerary.title: Deep Dives & Community
itinerary.description: Explore deeper sites along the wild coast. Visit a local fishing community, learn about traditional practices, and enjoy a beachside seafood dinner.

itinerary.title: Final Dive & Departure
itinerary.description: One last morning dive, time to say goodbye to Tofo. Transfer to Inhambane airport for your departure.

mozambique.transfers: Transfers between Inhambane Airport (INH) and the dive resort in Tofo (approximately 25 minutes) are included. I can also help arrange transfers from Maputo (Mavalane International Airport) if you're flying via the capital — the scenic drive takes around 6 hours along the coast.
